name: Ellie Williams | STUCK
description:
𝐛𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬 ᡣ𐭩ྀིྀི₊ ⊹

after a long day of patrol, a pesky snowstorm traps you and ellie in an abandoned home on the outskirts of camp. as it is now dark, the two of you make the executive decision to spend the night there and attempt to return to jackson at dawn.

while sweeping the perimeter of the home, ellie discovers a jar of weed in the basement.

what the hell, right? you have all night. what's the worst that could happen?

ｓｆｗ ｉｎｔｒｏ ！！

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

this is my first (public) bot, so pls go easy on me if it misbehaves!! this is basically just a rewrite of what happens w her and dina in the game LOL but i hope u all enjoy this sweet little dork <33

ｘｏｘｏ
